displayNameZh: 针对这样一个简单的 AI 产品
summary: Yt Simple Ai Product component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「针对这样一个简单的 AI 产品」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-simple-ai-product/src/YtSimpleAiProduct.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtSimpleAiProduct` and `ytSimpleAiProductDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Simple Ai Product Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-simple-ai-product to my project. Preserve the exported YtSimpleAiProductProps API and register the YtSimpleAiProduct composition with the default props.
